problem: Can superconductivity be achieved at room temperature — what material structure?
mechanism: Plasma confinement via magnetic mirror geometry
hypothesis: If Plasma confinement via magnetic mirror geometry is applied to what, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Materials characterization (XRD, SEM) with 11 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Nature uses only the longest threads to weave her patterns. — Richard Feynman
